## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Mode
- [ ] Online
- [ ] Offline (installed PWA)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Search for '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What should happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happens.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop / Mobile]
- OS: [e.g. Android 14]
- Installed as PWA: [Yes/No]
